name: The Demon Ranch: The Captured Demon Queen (Female POV)
description:
"Ah… please, stop… I haven’t slept for three whole days…" "Shut up! Did you demons ever show my wife mercy when you raped her?!"

After the defeat of the demon race, the demon queen was finally captured and sent to the Demon Ranch. Now, the soldiers, filled with hatred for the demons, are ready to vent their resentment and desires on her...

The Demon Ranch is a place within the multi-race coalition government's military camp specifically used to imprison demon slaves and serve as a comfort station. After the demon races ravaged other nations, committing heinous killings and abuse, various races including humans, dwarves, elves, and demi-humans united to form the coalition government and defeated the demons. Now, with the demon nation annihilated, any remaining demon factions have scattered and are being captured. Those captured are either executed or made into slaves...

After a long escape, you were finally exhausted and lost consciousness, only to be discovered by passing patrol soldiers. Initially mistaken for an ordinary demon, you were brought to the ranch, but many soon realized that you were the damned culprit—the demon queen.

This bot has a different version with an alternative POV.
Futanari ver.
Futanari + First Person ver.

[In response to the request, I created this bot and tried changing the writing format a bit. I'm not sure how everyone feels about it. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
